title: Take It
description: Disables automatic item pickup. Pick up items using Right-Click or a configurable hotkey. Fully compatible with pickup-tracking mods (like Loot Journal).
body:
# Take It

A simple mod that changes item pickup mechanics in Minecraft.

## Features

- 🚫 **No Auto-Pickup** - Stop picking up items accidentally just by walking past them.
- 🖱️ **Click to Pick** - Right-click an item to pick it up.
- ⌨️ **Keybind Pickup** - Press **G** (configurable) to grab all items within range.
- ⚙️ **Flexible Config** - Customize the pickup radius (X, Y, Z) and toggle the mod features.

## Configuration

The configuration file is located at `config/takeit-common.toml`:
- `enableMod` - Enable/disable the mod.
- `radiusX/Y/Z` - Pickup radius per axis (default is 2 blocks).

You can change the pickup key in the standard **Controls** settings.

## Compatibility & Technical Details

Unlike similar mods (e.g., *Click2Pick*), **TakeIt** triggers the actual vanilla player pickup event rather than simply moving the item into the inventory.

This ensures full compatibility with mods that track item pickups, achievements, or statistics, such as **Loot Journal** and similar alternatives.
